_doc: Synthetic fixtures for the replace-text-version-mismatch playbook. This is a DESIGN-TIME Studio crash - the process never ran in Orchestrator, so there are no jobs. Diagnosis comes from the project source (UiPath.Word.Activities version vs Studio version), not job evidence.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key a8b9c0d1-e2f3-4193-4051-627384950617 --state Faulted --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback for unmatched commands (no jobs exist for this design-time crash).
